title: AnonymousNames+
description: Hide player identities during combat so you don't get scared by their aura this mod includes aliases, skin obfuscation, anti-targeting and kill revealing.
body:
# AnonymousNames 🕵️‍♂️✨
![anonymouslogos](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5b8de9d7e935b3cc6a0fbc33a59ff2b4702754c0.png)
A powerful, highly customizable client-side mod designed for competitive PvP players. Hide opponent identities, scramble skins, and mask pings to prevent targeting, eliminate mental bias, and keep your focus 100% on the fight.
## Alias System 🎭
Replace real player names in the tab list, over their heads, and in chat with generated aliases.
How It Works
Dynamically replaces every player's name with a unique generated alias.
Works seamlessly across nametags, the Tab list, and chat messages.
Advanced Chat Filter automatically detects and hides real names even if they use custom prefixes, suffixes (like _YT), or homoglyphs.
Alias Themes
Choose from 12 different generation modes to match your aesthetic:
| Theme | Example Alias | Description |
| :--- | :--- | :--- |
| Code | A-F8B2C4 | Hexadecimal ID codes |
| Cyberpunk | NODE_77 | Dystopian network IDs |
| Military | ECHO-4 | Tactical callsigns |
| Hacker | Z3r0_x | Leetspeak / 2012 Hacker names |
| Sweat | V7 | Ultra-short 2-character competitive names |
| Roman | VX-IV | Roman numeral designations |
| AI | LLM-7b | Artificial Intelligence node names |
| Words/Names | DarkWolf | Standard auto-generated Minecraft names |
## Skin Obfuscation 👤
Stop recognizing players by their cosmetics or sweaty PvP skins.
Features
Random Default: Assigns every player a random, permanent Steve or Alex skin from a specific curated pool.
Rotate Mode: Periodically cycles the skins of everyone in the lobby to prevent tracking players by their randomized skin.
Default: Keep vanilla skins if you only want to hide names.
## Glitch & Animation System 💥
Bring your aliases to life with a fully animated matrix-style glitch effect.
Features
Aliases periodically "glitch" out, swapping characters for symbols (#, @, X, 0).
Combat Boost: The glitch intensity scales up dynamically based on how actively you are fighting a player.
Silky smooth transition animations when aliases are changed or reshuffled.
## Match & Kill Reveal 👁️‍🗨️
Find out who you were actually fighting—but only when the time is right.
Features
Kill Reveal: Prints the real name of the player you just eliminated in chat (e.g., ► VX-22 was actually Technoblade). Includes a customizable delay so it doesn't distract you mid-fight.
Match Reveal: Automatically detects when a game ends (or trigger it manually) to drop a satisfying list in chat revealing the real identities of everyone in the lobby.
## Anti-Targeting System 🛡️
Advanced protections to stop you from tracking (or being tracked).
Features
Alias Reshuffle: Automatically swaps aliases between players periodically. If you were tracking NODE_99, suddenly they are someone else entirely.
Fake Ping: Replaces the real tab-list latency numbers with random, realistic ping values so you can't identify a player by their connection speed.
## HUD & Config GUI 🖥️
A clean, built-in settings screen for tweaking the mod on the fly.
Features
Toggle modules, change alias themes, adjust glitch intensity, and set reveal delays without leaving the game.
Scrollable tabbed interface.
Accessible via keybind or ModMenu integration.
## Keybinds & Commands ⌨️
Everything is a single keypress or command away.
Action	Default Key / Command
Toggle Focus Mode	O (Keybind)
Open Config GUI	P (Keybind)
Manual Match Reveal	/anonymousnames match
Flush Kill Reveals	/anonymousnames reveal
Clear/Reset Aliases	/anonymousnames reload
(All keybinds are fully remappable in the vanilla Controls menu. Full command tree available via /anonymousnames)
## Why Use AnonymousNames? 💡
- > ⚔️ Eliminate Bias: Stop playing differently just because you recognize a "pro" or a "noob" name.
- > 🎯 Prevent Targeting: Stop focusing specific players based on their identity.
- > 🎨 Aesthetic: Give your game a cool, uniform cyberpunk or tactical feel.
- > 🧠 Focus: Keep your UI clean and your mind completely on the mechanics of the fight.

Credits
Icon pfp by: Caioxbz
